title: Dokuta Suton (Dr. Stone)
description: Dokuta Suton (Dr. Stone) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to experience the world of Dr. Stone!
body:
![Dokuta Suton (Dr. Stone) SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/psdsrzsw/images/df3e54819ce8a846ea14f4abab3d49324959d115.png)
# Overview
**Dokuta Suton (Dr. Stone)** is a Sci-fi themed Modpack based on the anime/manga "Dokuta Suton (Dr. Stone)". An unnatural event has occured and you along with everyone else has been turned to stone! Wait for the stone to crack and choose your path, from technology to weaponary and more! Save your friends and villagers from their stone prison and bring them back. In this world you'll need all the knowledge you can get to survive and perhaps even more...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/dokuta-suton)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dokuta-suton)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Dr. Stone** - Enjoy a world turned to stone, equip the outfit of Senku or perhaps develope the revival fluid instead.
- [✔️] **Visuals** - Enjoy a world of enhanced visuals, from a vibrant night sky to particle animations for all your favourite blocks.
- [✔️] **Create** - From low to high tech, harness the power of water wheels and gears to make your way through this stony world building your knowledge as you go.

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
